text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, while walking past the gym...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Ready, set! Trinity Pose!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Knees! Elbows! Shoulders! Knees! Elbows!
Shoulders!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: KNEES! ELBOWS! SHOULDERS! TRINITYYY!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Gold Ship is striking a pose by bending her knees,
elbows, and shoulders at sharp right angles.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Phew, that should do it.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Hey there, Trainer! You should've said hello
instead of just standing there like a log.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Well? What'd you think of my
Knees-Elbows-Shoulders Trinity Pose?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Right? It took tons of practice to get the angles
right all at the same time.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
I was thinking of busting it out during the next
winning concert...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
But something still feels missing, you know? What
do you think I can do to really make it pop?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While part if me wonders if she's serious about
posing like that at a winning concert, I still have
to give her an answer.
choice_data_list: Hold it as long as you can.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Huh, I thought I was giving it my all, but I guess
that didn't come across...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
All right, prepare to be blown away, Trainer! I'm
gonna do this with my enthusiasm cranked up to
the MAX!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: KNEEES! ELBOOOWS! SHOOOULDERS!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: TRINITYYYYY!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Huff... Wheeze... Wheeeze...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I find out later that Gold Ship's full-chested
bellowing reached every corner of the academy.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
You want me to hold that pose for as long as I
can? But it's so hard!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Then again, moving a crowd to tears through
sheer tenacity is the mark of a true entertainer.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
All right. Challenge accepted! You'd better watch
every second of this performance.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Trinity Pooose!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Behold... Gooolshi!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Gold Ship manages to hold the pose for thirty
whole minutes. Seeing that level of determination
fills me with courage... At least, I think it does.
